description: Designed Department of Labor graphic on a black-to-navy gradient background. The upper portion is a dark portrait photograph of Donald Trump (chest-up, dark navy suit, white shirt, red tie, flag lapel pin), lit against shadow. Across the middle in a mixed serif font is the text 'American Workers FIRST!' ('American Workers' in italic, 'FIRST!' in bold roman). Below are three torn-paper headline cards, each topped by an outlet logo banner and a headline in black serif: THE WESTERN JOURNAL (tagline 'Equipping Readers with the Truth'), 'Trump Admin Launches 175 H-1B Visa Abuse Investigations in \'Project Firewall\''; Blaze Media, 'Project Firewall: DOL targets visa sponsors in unprecedented H-1B enforcement crackdown'; and a larger FOX NEWS card (blue banner), 'Trump admin reveals over 100 investigations into H-1B abuses as it pledges \'every resource\' to protect US jobs'.
notable_text: American Workers FIRST! THE WESTERN JOURNAL: Trump Admin Launches 175 H-1B Visa Abuse Investigations in 'Project Firewall'. Blaze media: Project Firewall: DOL targets visa sponsors in unprecedented H-1B enforcement crackdown. FOX NEWS: Trump admin reveals over 100 investigations into H-1B abuses as it pledges 'every resource' to protect US jobs.
